Implementation Projects

Project-based solutions.
Delivered end-to-end.

One-time or phased implementation projects, delivered by certified specialists with full governance, documentation, and knowledge transfer.

Virtualization

VMware vSphere Cluster Deployment

End-to-end deployment of VMware vSphere infrastructure — from initial architecture design through implementation, configuration, and handover.

Infrastructure assessment and architecture design
ESXi host installation and cluster configuration
vCenter Server deployment and configuration
Storage integration (SAN/NAS/vSAN)
Network configuration (vDS, NSX-T optionally)
HA, DRS, and vMotion configuration
Documentation and knowledge transfer
Request a Quote →
Cloud

Cloud Migration & Deployment

Assessment, planning, and execution of workload migrations to AWS, Azure, or GCP — with minimal disruption and maximum optimization.

Workload discovery and migration assessment
Target architecture design and sizing
Migration wave planning and execution
Landing zone and governance configuration
Cost optimization post-migration
Cutover planning and execution support
Post-migration monitoring and tuning
Request a Quote →
Disaster Recovery

Disaster Recovery Architecture & Implementation

Design and implementation of enterprise disaster recovery solutions with defined RPO/RTO targets and tested runbooks.

Business impact analysis and RTO/RPO definition
DR architecture design (on-prem, cloud, or hybrid)
Replication setup (Veeam, Zerto, Azure Site Recovery)
DR site configuration and validation
Runbook development and tabletop testing
Scheduled DR tests and documentation
Ongoing DR maintenance and review
Request a Quote →
Security

Security Infrastructure Deployment

Design and deployment of enterprise security infrastructure — from perimeter firewalls to endpoint protection and SIEM solutions.

Security architecture assessment and design
Next-generation firewall deployment and configuration
Endpoint detection and response (EDR) rollout
SIEM platform deployment and tuning
Privileged access management (PAM) setup
Security baseline hardening across systems
Incident response runbook development
Request a Quote →
Network

Network Infrastructure Deployment

Design, procurement support, and deployment of enterprise network infrastructure — LAN, WAN, and SD-WAN environments.

Network architecture design and documentation
Core, distribution, and access layer configuration
Firewall and security policy implementation
WAN/SD-WAN design and deployment
VLAN, QoS, and routing configuration
Network monitoring tooling setup
Handover documentation and training
Request a Quote →

Future Expansion Areas

Nuvextro is continuously expanding its capabilities in these high-demand technology sectors.

Kubernetes Platforms

Enterprise Kubernetes cluster deployment, GitOps pipelines, and platform engineering.

Container Infrastructure

Container strategy, registry setup, and CI/CD pipeline design for containerized workloads.

AI Infrastructure Solutions

GPU cluster setup, LLM inference infrastructure, and enterprise AI platform deployments.

Enterprise Software Development

Custom tooling, automation platforms, and internal developer platforms.
